# MDDMA — Mumbai Dryfruits & Dates Merchants Association

> India's digital trade hub for dry fruits, dates, nuts and allied commodities. Verified member directory, multi-item RFQ engine, brand storefronts, and live APMC market signals — serving the Mumbai trade since 1930.

MDDMA connects verified importers, wholesalers, traders, and brokers across India's dry fruit and dates supply chain. Buyers browse storefronts and send RFQs; sellers manage product catalogs, brands, and inquiries. Pricing and stock are intentionally controlled (ranges and bands, not exact figures) to protect member margins.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Hero search, featured categories, brand strip, market ticker.
- [About](/about): MDDMA history, mandate, and governance since 1930.
- [Member Directory](/directory): Verified seller profiles with filters by category, origin, and verification level.
- [Commodity Marketplace](/products): Browse listings across almonds, cashews, dates, pistachios, walnuts, raisins and more.
- [Brands](/brands): House brands published by MDDMA member companies.
- [Broker Board](/broker): Listings from members operating as brokers.
- [Market Intelligence](/market): Live APMC trends, demand bands, and price movement signals.
- [Trade Community](/community): Discourse-powered discussions plus the legacy post archive.
- [Membership Plans](/membership): Free vs Paid (₹10,000/yr) tiers and benefits.
- [Circulars](/circulars): Official notices and trade circulars from the association.
- [Apply](/apply): Membership application flow.
- [Forms / Contact](/contact): Reach the MDDMA office.
- [Install App](/install): Add MDDMA Trade Hub to your home screen (PWA).

## Optional

- [Login](/login): Member sign-in.
- [Documents](/documents): Internal product, business, and engineering documentation (password-gated).
